name: therapy-plugins
description: Toolkits spanning major evidence-based and depth psychotherapy modalities.

plugins.name: cbt-toolkit
plugins.description: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy — identify and reframe distorted thoughts to shift feelings and behavior.

plugins.name: act-toolkit
plugins.description: Acceptance and Commitment Therapy — accept difficult thoughts and feelings while committing to values-guided action.

plugins.name: active-imagination-toolkit
plugins.description: Jungian Active Imagination — engage unconscious images and inner figures to integrate the psyche.

plugins.name: ba-toolkit
plugins.description: Behavioral Activation — re-engage with meaningful, rewarding activity to counter low mood.

plugins.name: cft-toolkit
plugins.description: Compassion-Focused Therapy — cultivate self-compassion to soften shame and harsh self-criticism.

plugins.name: dbt-toolkit
plugins.description: Dialectical Behavior Therapy — build mindfulness, distress tolerance, emotion regulation, and interpersonal effectiveness.

plugins.name: ipt-toolkit
plugins.description: Interpersonal Psychotherapy — resolve relationship conflict, grief, and role transitions that drive distress.

plugins.name: mbct-toolkit
plugins.description: Mindfulness-Based Cognitive Therapy — pair mindfulness with cognitive skills to interrupt rumination and relapse.

plugins.name: narrative-toolkit
plugins.description: Narrative Therapy — separate the person from the problem and re-author the stories that shape identity.

plugins.name: schema-toolkit
plugins.description: Schema Therapy — identify and heal early maladaptive schemas and the modes they trigger.

plugins.name: sfbt-toolkit
plugins.description: Solution-Focused Brief Therapy — focus on goals, strengths, and what already works rather than problems.
